overall.description: Static first-person perspective inside a luxury cyberpunk high-rise apartment bedroom from Cyberpunk 2077. The room features an unmade bed, wood-slatted ceiling, and large windows overlooking a foggy Night City skyline. A holographic television cycles through various advertisements and graphics while the camera remains completely still.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: television display changes to show PURE OVERKILL text advertisement
television switches to display stock market ticker showing 31.1% data
television transitions to underwater nature documentary footage

agents.ego_description: stationary in a high-rise apartment, watching the television display cycle through advertisements

entered.detail: messy bed with white sheets and a book resting on the edge
floor-to-ceiling windows with horizontal blinds revealing foggy cityscape with distant skyscrapers
large flatscreen television displaying cycling advertisements and digital content
curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats and recessed lighting
red neon sign with NC letters mounted on the wall above a console
small table with lamp and decorative items next to the bed

segments.scene_description: Static view of a luxurious cyberpunk bedroom with an unmade bed in the foreground and floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a foggy cityscape at dusk. A holographic television on the right cycles through various advertisements including monkey graphics, stock tickers, and nature documentaries while the room remains bathed in warm artificial light from the ceiling fixtures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a luxury cyberpunk bedroom that remains constant while the digital elements within the room evolve. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the foreground, set against floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a foggy cityscape at dusk. As the camera holds its position, the room stays bathed in warm artificial light from the wood-slatted ceiling fixtures. The scene then focuses on the holographic television to the right, which continuously cycles through a series of shifting advertisements. These digital displays transition from monkey graphics to scrolling stock tickers and nature documentaries, providing the only movement within the otherwise still environment.
